sections.paragraph:
f. pr. elevation (from גָּאָה), hence-

(1) magnificence, majesty, as of God, Deu 33:26 Psa 68:35.

(2) ornament, splendour (Pracht), Job 41:7 Deu 33:29.

(3) pride, arrogancy. Psa 73:6, לָכֵן עֲנָקַתְמֹו גַאֲוָה “therefore pride clothes their neck,” i.e. they are elated with pride. A stiff neck being regarded as the seat of pride. Pa. 31:24; Pro 14:3 Isa 9:8 13:3 , 11 Isa 13:11 16:6 25:11 . Used of the sea, Psa 46:4, “the mountains quake at its pride.”
